intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文心理线记忆：Hugh 决定节食、写出 forbidden foods 清单、清单上多是爱吃的东西、朋友来访、慌忙藏包、明显尴尬、内疚解释、包里全是巧克力和糖果。读的时候不要把身材当笑点，重点读出 strict rule、temptation 和 excuse 的反讽。

sentences.text: My friend, Hugh, has always been fat, but things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：Hugh 最近觉得情况变糟，于是决定控制饮食。读这句时轻轻带过 source wording，重点放在 things got so bad that 和 decided to go on a diet。

sentences.text: He began his diet a week ago. First of all, he wrote out a long list of all the foods which were forbidden.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他一周前开始，首先写出一张很长的禁食清单。First of all 后稍停，wrote out 和 foods which were forbidden 要读清楚。

sentences.text: The list included most of the things Hugh loves: butter, potatoes, rice, beer, milk, chocolate; and sweets.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：清单上包括大多数 Hugh 喜欢的东西。included most of the things 是笑点铺垫，食物列表慢一点读，不需要夸张。

sentences.text: Yesterday I paid him a visit. I rang the bell and was not surprised to see that Hugh was still as fat as ever.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：昨天朋友去看他，按门铃后看到 Hugh 还是老样子。paid him a visit 是看望某人，as...as ever 读结构，不把它读成嘲笑。

sentences.text: He led me into his room and hurriedly hid a large parcel under his desk. It was obvious that he was very embarrassed.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：Hugh 把朋友带进房间，慌忙把大包藏到桌下，显然很尴尬。hurriedly hid 要读出心虚动作，It was obvious that 要连成块。

sentences.text: When I asked him what he was doing, he smiled guiltily and then put the parcel on the desk.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：朋友问他在做什么，他内疚地笑了，然后把包放到桌上。smiled guiltily 是心理重点，guiltily 慢一点。

sentences.text: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他解释说饮食计划太严格，所以不得不偶尔奖励自己。so strict that 是核心结构，reward himself occasionally 要读出借口味道。

sentences.text: Then he showed me the contents of the parcel. It contained five large bars of chocolate and three bags of sweets!
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他展示包里的东西，里面有五大块巧克力和三袋糖果。contents 和 contained 一组记，最后的 chocolate and sweets 是 punchline。
